Item.Text: Size of the array and its elements were not specified. Empty array will be created!
All the statements after '{0}' would be ignored by compiler!
Fields should not be defined in interfaces! Use it at Your own risk :)
Static constructor can only have 'static' keyword. Other keywords will be ignored!
Enum field with the same value already exists!
Static methods should not be accessed from an object!
Const/static fields should not be accessed from an object!
